description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a bald head and neutral facial expression. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and long pants, with the shirt tucked in and the pants fitted. The arms are extended slightly outward from the body, and the hands are relaxed with fingers spread. The figure stands upright with feet flat on the ground, wearing simple, closed-toe shoes. The overall appearance is generic and suitable for representing a typical urban pedestrian in a variety of city environments.
description: A bald adult figure in a short-sleeved shirt and long pants, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and wearing closed-toe shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full frontal details of the shirt, pants, and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the straight alignment of the body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, body, and the relaxed posture of the arm and hand.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved shirt and fitted long pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
